prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Scheme. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```scheme
#!/usr/bin/env gsi-script

(define *repo-dir* ".minigit")
(define *index-file* (string-append *repo-dir* "/index"))
(define *refs-dir* (string-append *repo-dir* "/refs"))
(define *head-file* (string-append *repo-dir* "/HEAD"))
(define *objects-dir* (string-append *repo-dir* "/objects"))
(define *master-ref* (string-append *refs-dir* "/master"))

(define (create-directory dir)
  (unless (file-exists? dir)
    (create-directory* dir)))

(define (create-directory* dir)
  (if (string-contains dir "/")
      (let ((parent (substring dir 0 (string-rindex dir #\/))))
        (create-directory* parent)))
  (unless (file-exists? dir)
    (create-directory dir)))

(define (write-file filename content)
  (call-with-output-file filename
    (lambda (out)
      (display content out))))

(define (read-file filename)
  (if (file-exists? filename)
      (call-with-input-file filename
        (lambda (in)
          (let loop ((line (read-line in))
                     (lines '()))
            (if (eof-object? line)
                (string-join (reverse lines) "\n")
                (loop (read-line in) (cons line lines))))))
      ""))

(define (file-exists? filename)
  (with-exception-handler
   (lambda (e) #f)
   (lambda ()
     (let ((port (open-input-file filename)))
       (close-input-port port)
       #t))))

(define (string-join lst delim)
  (if (null? lst)
      ""
      (let loop ((lst (cdr lst))
                 (result (car lst)))
        (if (null? lst)
            result
            (loop (cdr lst) (string-append result delim (car lst)))))))

(define (string-rindex str char)
  (let ((len (string-length str)))
    (let loop ((i (- len 1)))
      (cond ((< i 0) #f)
            ((char=? (string-ref str i) char) i)
            (else (loop (- i 1)))))))

(define (string-contains str substr)
  (let ((len-str (string-length str))
        (len-sub (string-length substr)))
    (let loop ((i 0))
      (cond ((> (+ i len-sub) len-str) #f)
            ((string=? (substring str i (+ i len-sub)) substr) i)
            (else (loop (+ i 1)))))))

(define (sha1 content)
  (let ((port (open-input-process (string-append "echo -n \"" content "\" | sha1sum"))))
    (let ((hash (read-line port)))
      (close-input-port port)
      (substring hash 0 40))))

(define (hash-object content)
  (let ((hash (sha1 content)))
    (let ((dir (string-append *objects-dir* "/" (substring hash 0 2)))
          (file (string-append *objects-dir* "/" (substring hash 0 2) "/" (substring hash 2))))
      (create-directory dir)
      (write-file file content)
      hash)))

(define (read-object hash)
  (let ((file (string-append *objects-dir* "/" (substring hash 0 2) "/" (substring hash 2))))
    (if (file-exists? file)
        (read-file file)
        "")))

(define (update-index filename)
  (let ((content (read-file filename))
        (hash (hash-object (read-file filename))))
    (let ((index (read-file *index-file*))
          (lines (string-split index #\newline))
          (found #f))
      (let ((new-lines
             (map (lambda (line)
                    (if (string=? line "")
                        line
                        (let ((parts (string-split line #\space)))
                          (if (string=? (car parts) filename)
                              (begin
                                (set! found #t)
                                (string-append filename " " hash))
                              line))))
                  lines)))
        (unless found
          (set! new-lines (cons (string-append filename " " hash) new-lines)))
        (write-file *index-file* (string-join new-lines "\n"))))))

(define (string-split str char)
  (let loop ((start 0)
             (result '()))
    (let ((pos (string-index str char start)))
      (if pos
          (loop (+ pos 1) (cons (substring str start pos) result))
          (reverse (cons (substring str start (string-length str)) result))))))

(define (string-index str char start)
  (let ((len (string-length str)))
    (let loop ((i start))
      (cond ((>= i len) #f)
            ((char=? (string-ref str i) char) i)
            (else (loop (+ i 1)))))))

(define (read-index)
  (let ((index (read-file *index-file*)))
    (if (string=? index "")
        '()
        (map (lambda (line)
               (let ((parts (string-split line #\space)))
                 (cons (car parts) (cadr parts))))
             (string-split index #\newline)))))

(define (write-tree)
  (let ((entries (read-index)))
    (let ((content (string-join
                    (map (lambda (entry)
                           (string-append (car entry) " " (cdr entry)))
                         entries)
                    "\n")))
      (hash-object content))))

(define (get-parent)
  (if (file-exists? *head-file*)
      (let ((head (read-file *head-file*)))
        (if (string-prefix? "ref: " head)
            (let ((ref (substring head 5)))
              (if (file-exists? ref)
                  (read-file ref)
                  ""))
            head))
      ""))

(define (string-prefix? prefix str)
  (let ((len-prefix (string-length prefix))
        (len-str (string-length str)))
    (and (>= len-str len-prefix)
         (string=? (substring str 0 len-prefix) prefix))))

(define (commit-tree tree message)
  (let ((parent (get-parent))
        (content (string-append "tree " tree "\n"
                                (if (string=? parent "")
                                    ""
                                    (string-append "parent " parent "\n"))
                                "message " message "\n")))
    (let ((hash (hash-object content)))
      (write-file *head-file* hash)
      (if (file-exists? *master-ref*)
          (write-file *master-ref* hash))
      hash)))

(define (get-branch)
  (if (file-exists? *head-file*)
      (let ((head (read-file *head-file*)))
        (if (string-prefix? "ref: " head)
            (substring head 5)
            head))
      ""))

(define (set-branch branch)
  (let ((ref (string-append *refs-dir* "/" branch)))
    (if (file-exists? ref)
        (write-file *head-file* (string-append "ref: " ref))
        (begin
          (write-file ref "")
          (write-file *head-file* (string-append "ref: " ref))))))

(define (read-commit hash)
  (let ((content (read-object hash)))
    (if (string=? content "")
        (list "" "" "")
        (let ((lines (string-split content #\newline)))
          (let ((tree (substring (car lines) 5))
                (parent (if (and (> (length lines) 1)
                                 (string-prefix? "parent " (cadr lines)))
                            (substring (cadr lines) 7)
                            ""))
                (message (if (string-prefix? "parent " (cadr lines))
                             (substring (caddr lines) 8)
                             (substring (cadr lines) 8))))
            (list tree parent message))))))

(define (checkout commit)
  (let ((content (read-object commit)))
    (if (string=? content "")
        (display "Commit not found\n")
        (let ((tree (car (read-commit commit))))
          (let ((tree-content (read-object tree)))
            (let ((entries (string-split tree-content #\newline)))
              (for-each (lambda (entry)
                          (if (not (string=? entry ""))
                              (let ((parts (string-split entry #\space)))
                                (let ((filename (car parts))
                                      (hash (cadr parts)))
                                  (let ((file-content (read-object hash)))
                                    (write-file filename file-content))))))
                        entries)
              (write-file *head-file* commit)))))))

(define (list-commits)
  (let ((current (read-file *head-file*)))
    (if (string-prefix? "ref: " current)
        (let ((ref (substring current 5)))
          (if (file-exists? ref)
              (let ((hash (read-file ref)))
                (let loop ((hash hash))
                  (if (string=? hash "")
                      (newline)
                      (let ((commit (read-commit hash)))
                        (display hash)
                        (newline)
                        (loop (cadr commit))))))
              (newline)))
        (unless (string=? current "")
          (let loop ((hash current))
            (if (string=? hash "")
                (newline)
                (let ((commit (read-commit hash)))
                  (display hash)
                  (newline)
                  (loop (cadr commit)))))))))

(define (main args)
  (cond ((< (length args) 2)
         (display "Usage: minigit <command> [<args>]\n"))
        ((string=? (cadr args) "init")
         (create-directory *repo-dir*)
         (create-directory *refs-dir*)
         (create-directory *objects-dir*)
         (write-file *index-file* "")
         (write-file *head-file* "")
         (write-file *master-ref* ""))
        ((string=? (cadr args) "add")
         (if (< (length args) 3)
             (display "Usage: minigit add <filename>\n")
             (update-index (caddr args))))
        ((string=? (cadr args) "write-tree")
         (display (write-tree))
         (newline))
        ((string=? (cadr args) "commit")
         (if (< (length args) 3)
             (display "Usage: minigit commit <message>\n")
             (let ((tree (write-tree)))
               (display (commit-tree tree (caddr args)))
               (newline))))
        ((string=? (cadr args) "checkout")
         (if (< (length args) 3)
             (display "Usage: minigit checkout <commit>\n")
             (checkout (caddr args))))
        ((string=? (cadr args) "log")
         (list-commits))
        (else
         (display "Unknown command\n"))))

(main (command-line))
```
